what: Neural pipeline scored on the verse fold: the first leakage-clean tragedy dependency evaluation (gold from the UNESP Trees project, CC BY-SA 4.0).
protocol: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); greek.evaluate_on_verse(track=...); CPU sequential (canonical); gold tokenization; official CoNLL-2018 evaluator; fold verse-fold-v1 (sha 6e91adbe...), built from perseids-publications/unesp-trees @ a6367b97, leakage-checked in-build (0/39 sentences overlap training; work-level disjointness asserted)

tragedy_bootstrap_ci_95.note: percentile bootstrap over the track's sentences, 999 resamples

gold_diligence: single-pass teaching-project provenance; an 8-sentence scholarly spot-check (~180 tokens, incl. lyric parodos passages) against Smyth/AGDT found one immaterial lemma-accent slip and only defensible judgment calls otherwise: trustworthy for a small-sample row
framing: SMALL-SAMPLE genre-conditioned datapoint with wide CIs, never a headline number; the hexameter track (3 sentences / 25 tokens) is directional only and is not pinned as a track number; tragedy LAS (~73) runs well below the documentary fold (~80): poetic word order and hyperbaton are materially harder to parse
